name: CSM Self-Service Q&A Workflow (PT-BR)
serviceNowSurface: Now Assist Q&A on the consumer portal; case create on fallback
trigger: Consumer submits a query on the portal Q&A widget
businessOutcome: Deflect repetitive consumer questions to grounded, cited answers in pt-BR while keeping LGPD safe and human escalation always one click away.
inputs: authenticated consumer context (sys_id only, used internally)
steps: Run Guardian on the input: prompt-injection, offensiveness, sensitive-topic.
Detect language; default to pt-BR when ambiguous.
Route the query to Now Assist Q&A scoped to the vetted KB subset.
If confidence below the threshold or KB returns nothing, route to fallback (case create) with the original query attached.
Render the answer with citation and a visible fallback button alongside.
Log the interaction with prompt, response, citation, user, timestamp.
approvalPoints: Legal sign-off on the vetted KB scope expansion
Communications sign-off on each new article
Senior agent oversight available; never gated
failureStates: Guardian flags input: surface a polite message and offer fallback.
KB returns nothing relevant: surface fallback only, no answer.
Confidence below threshold: surface fallback only.
Network or model failure: portal degrades to FAQ static page; fallback button still visible.
auditNotes: All interactions retrievable for LGPD audit on demand.
Monthly KB gap review uses low-confidence interactions as input.
No PII stored in prompt logs beyond the consumer query as typed.
tests: Question requesting account-specific PII rejected, fallback offered.
Out-of-scope question (legal advice) routed to fallback.
Sarcastic colloquial pt-BR flagged for human review.
Citation always present on answered queries.
End-to-end latency p95 below 5 seconds on sub-prod.
